name: useControllableState
description: Hook that manages both controlled and uncontrolled state patterns

parameters.name: options.value
parameters.description: The controlled value. When provided, the component becomes controlled

source.source: * @param {Value} [options.value] The controlled value. When provided, the component becomes controlled

parameters.description: The callback function called when the state changes
